title: Beginnings
subtitle: Suggested Entry Points to this Website
pageTitle: Beginnings: Suggested Entry Points to this Website
contentHtml:
There are more than 2,000 web pages on this site, containing hundreds of books, articles, sutta translations, and more — all of which may be a bit overwhelming if you're new to the site or to the teachings of Theravada Buddhism. Here are some starting points to help you get oriented.

General information about Theravada Buddhism
  • What is Theravada Buddhism?
  • Theravada Buddhism: A Chronology
  • A Sketch of the Buddha's Life: Readings from the Pali Canon
Introduction to the Buddha's teachings
  • The Buddha and His Dhamma, by Bhikkhu Bodhi.
  • A Path to Freedom: A Self-guided Tour of the Buddha's Teachings
  • The Nobility of the Truths, by Bhikkhu Bodhi
  • Refuge: an Introduction to the Buddha, Dhamma, and Sangha, by Thanissaro Bhikkhu
  • Study Guides: annotated anthologies of short passages from the Canon, for individual or group study
  • Many of the Bodhi Leaves booklets offer personal reflections on Buddhism that newcomers often find helpful.
Beginning meditation
  • A Guided Meditation, by Thanissaro Bhikkhu
  • Buddho, by Ajaan Thate
  • Starting Out Small: A Collection of Talks for Beginning Meditators, by Ajaan Lee Dhammadharo
Reading the Suttas
  • The Buddha's first sermon
  • Random sutta
Useful navigational points of reference
  • Site map
  • Frequently asked questions about the website
  • How to download the entire website
  • Help is never more than a click away: click on the Help link near the top right corner of each page.
